title: Value Proposition as Distinction
html:
Value Proposition as Distinction

Yahir's earliest crisp articulation of how he thinks about standing out: "Distinguishing your self doesn't mean getting ahead, bringing something to the table of value is what gets you ahead." The original capture is the two-line note 2020 05 09 distinguishing your self, written at age 17 mid-pandemic.

The frame is anti-credentialist and anti-zero-sum: distinction is not about being above someone, it's about adding something not currently on the table. It pre-figures the asking the right question disposition, the nonobvious bias, and the later no runway discipline of having to make every action create real surplus.

Connections

asking the right question · nonobvious · disconnected from outcome · be your own original

Distinguishing yourself = bringing value to the table
